Who does Tablet of Scriptures and By Rose Alone WoD belong too?
salvador and sorel, respectively
I see ty, who else can you use those? Idk if I wanna invest in those two

tablet is good as a utility support option on any caro team, since it increases the maximum cap of the furnace which means you can stock up more heals
by rose alone is good for multihit carries which would primarily be aurita, tawil, mouchette (though they usually have better options)
both are somewhat niche and not really all too commonly used

When we are talking about lightless shop priorities
rewind time -> celestial beast -> heart of knight
Are we talking about first getting e2 of each and then maxing in this order?
Can go any order you want, I personally raised Rewinding Time & Celestial Beast to E2 first as I have 2 Characters that I use often that can use it
Those being Aigis (for Rewinding Time) & Mouchette (for Celestial Beast)
If you don't feel the need to raise one of them, you can opt out of doing so without much repercussion
Heart of knight doesnt sounds great with Sigil Yield main stat
Though, it's generally recommended to raise Rewinding Time as it's the most flexible WoD (capable of generating lots Keyflare & re-generating played Cards of the Wielder)
Yeah, it's a fairly niche WoD
Main People who'd probably want it would be Castor, Corposant, Salvador, Nautila, Alva (and Ogier himself)
